title: ALL Recycling Recipes
description: The ultimate stonecutter, recycling, and uncrafting datapack generator.
body: # ALL Recycling Recipes Yet another wood-cutting/recycling datapack. I wasn't fully satisfied with some of the other ones I tried, so I took upon myself to write my own recipe generator, _and make it available in the sources_. With it, balance changes and recipes for new materials can be made in bulk. You are free to use that generator to create and publish your own datapack. ## Datapack Overview This prioritizes convenience over the vanilla balance. **Almost all items can be recycled losslessly.** Only barks are not recycled lossesly; they remain crafted 4:3, but are recycled 1:1. Almost everything that comes out of the stonecutter can be uncrafted back to its source material, by placing 4 of them in a crafting grid, (and sometimes directly in the stonecutter). Slabs can also be uncrafted by placing 2 horizontally, like for most other recycling packs. Stonecutter can also be used for : - Wood-cutting, glass-cutting and metal-cutting (iron, gold, and copper) - stripping logs - scrapping copper (both wax and oxidation) - cleaning mossy stones - cobbling smelted stones. The furnace can be used for : - Clearing glass (both tinted and stained) The vanilla recipes for **nether bricks fences** and **iron/copper bars** were nerfed, in order to allow lossless 1:1 recycling with no duplication. Using the stonecutter for those items is still a gain over vanilla. ## Cutting Discounts - Buttons: 0% - Stairs: -33% (Same as the vanilla discount for stone stairs) - Pressure Plates: -50% - Doors: -50% - Trapdoors: -66% - Fences: -11% (The cost of sticks/bricks) - Fence gates: -66% - Signs: -52% - Iron Chains: -18% (The cost of nuggets) - Iron bars: -50% (-33% compared to vanilla) - Glass Panes: -33% - Carpets: -25% # Related Mods ### [ **Datapack Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/packrule-menus) Makes the datapack menu accessible from singleplayer worlds
